title: Re-totems
description: A small pack that adds 46 new types of totems, which can be obtained by renaming. You will have to find many totems yourself
body:
A small pack that adds 46 new types of totems, which can be obtained by renaming. You will have to find many totems yourself. there is only 39 of them. For the resource pack to work, it should be unpacked to the "resourcepacks" folder

- _Aiot
- _Tifer_
- ZaViToK 
- MRMoto
- bdana740
